message:
perf(runtime): simplify priority reads and poll snapshot in scheduler/state

Replace .and_then(|inner| inner.read().ok().map(..)) chains with
direct .map(|inner| inner.read().budget.priority) now that parking_lot
read() is infallible. Affected sites:

- ThreeLaneWorker waiter priority lookup (line ~1730): simplify from
  and_then+ok+map to map+read for woken task priority extraction
- ThreeLaneWorker task dispatch priority lookup (line ~1851): same
  simplification for scheduling priority reads
- TaskSnapshot poll_count calculation: simplify and_then+read().ok()
  to map+read() for budget baseline extraction during task snapshots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2439,7 +2439,7 @@ impl TaskSnapshot {
         let poll_count = record
             .cx_inner
             .as_ref()
-            .and_then(|inner| inner.read().ok())
+            .map(|inner| inner.read())
             .map(|inner| inner.budget_baseline.poll_quota)
             .map_or(0, |baseline| {
                 u64::from(baseline.saturating_sub(record.polls_remaining))
